title: Implement Admin Dashboard Analytics and Widgets
description: Replace placeholders in the admin dashboard with functional sales charts, 'Requires Attention' section, and a 'Last Orders' widget with period selector.
acceptance_criteria: Functional Sales Chart for last 30 days is visible on the dashboard.
'Requires Attention' cards show counts for NEW, UNPAID, SHIPPED, PROBLEM orders.
Last Orders widget displays list of orders for selected period.
Period selector works for 10, 30, and 90 days.
Layout is responsive and follows mobile-first design.
The code passes npm run lint.
